overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval castle interior. The character moves from a candlelit library through a dining hall, ascends a narrow stone spiral staircase, and emerges into a bright upper hall with large arched windows. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with detailed stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle library transitioning to dining hall

events.description: moving from book-lined library into dining hall with long wooden tables
approaching and opening wooden door to exit the dining hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the castle interior, passing bookshelves and dining tables

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelves filled with books against the stone wall
multi-branched candle holder hanging from the ceiling
long wooden banquet table with benches

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a candlelit castle library with tall bookshelves, then transitions into a dining hall featuring long wooden tables. The character walks steadily through these connected rooms, passing stone archways and wall-mounted candles, heading toward a wooden exit door.

events.description: entering narrow stone spiral stairwell from the dining hall
passing a closed wooden door embedded in the right wall of the stairwell
reaching the top of the staircase and entering the bright upper hall

agents.ego_description: climbing the narrow spiral staircase, hugging the stone wall while moving upward

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps curving upward
rough-hewn stone blocks forming the tight stairwell walls
simple wooden railing along the left side of the stairs
closed wooden door with metal studs set into the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow, dimly lit stone spiral staircase for an extended climb. The walls are rough-hewn stone blocks with occasional narrow slits. At around 25 seconds, a wooden door appears on the right wall before the character continues upward to reach the top landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand upper hall with arched windows

events.description: emerging from dark stairwell into bright hall with natural light streaming through large windows
turning right to circle around the central stone well structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious upper hall, examining the architecture and circling the central well

entered.detail: tall arched windows with diamond-patterned lattice allowing bright natural light
thick cylindrical stone pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling
octagonal stone well or fountain with columns in the center of the hall
lit torches mounted on the stone walls between windows
stacked wooden barrels and crates against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark staircase into a grand, sunlit hall with high vaulted ceilings and large arched windows. The space features massive stone columns, a central well structure, and scattered debris on the floor. The character explores the perimeter of the room, passing wooden barrels and stone benches while natural light illuminates the dusty interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, candlelit castle interior that gradually ascends into a bright, sun-drenched upper hall. It begins in a library filled with tall bookshelves before gliding through stone archways into a dining hall with long wooden tables. The camera then shifts from these open rooms into the claustrophobic confines of a narrow stone spiral staircase, climbing past rough-hewn walls and a solitary wooden door. As the climb concludes, the scene opens abruptly from the darkness of the stairs into a grand hall characterized by high vaulted ceilings and massive stone columns. Finally, the lighting transforms from flickering candlelight to brilliant natural light streaming through large arched windows, illuminating dusty floors scattered with debris and wooden barrels.
